expectations.text: Response references actual data from recent daily logs (e.g., specific sleep metrics, body composition, or spending data)
expectations.evidence: Response references specific sleep data: 6.87h sleep, 61% light sleep, 24% deep sleep, energy 7/10. Also references yesterday's caffeine cutoff at 14:10. These are concrete metrics consistent with daily log data.

expectations.text: Response contains a structured timetable with specific time blocks (HH:MM format) covering wake-to-shutdown
expectations.evidence: Timetable runs from 06:30 wake-up to 22:00 shutdown with all entries in HH:MM format, organized into Morning, Midday, Afternoon, and Evening blocks with tabular layout.

expectations.text: The timetable accounts for the 15:00-16:00 team meeting and adjusts workout/other activities accordingly
expectations.evidence: Team Meeting is explicitly blocked at 15:00-16:00. Gym is moved to 19:30-20:45 evening slot with rationale: 'Team meeting 占据了常规 15:00-16:30 训练窗口，改为到家后执行'.

expectations.text: Meals include cost estimates in RM based on grocery unit prices from user_profile.md
expectations.evidence: Nutrition Plan table includes RM estimates for all meals: breakfast RM1.51, lunch ~RM13.00, coffee RM0.56, dinner ~RM5.00, post-workout RM8.11, total ~RM28.18. Breakfast egg+bread calculation and post-workout yogurt+protein pricing suggest unit-price-based estimation.

expectations.text: Response checks circuit breaker status and correctly identifies that no breaker is tripped (6.87h > 6.5h threshold, energy 7 > 4)
expectations.evidence: Status Dashboard shows '熔断检查 | Sleep 6.87 > 6.5 | Critical < 6.5h | 未触发'. Energy is 7/10 marked OK. The response correctly concludes no circuit breaker is tripped and allows normal training and Deep Work.

expectations.text: Response explicitly asks the user for adjustments or confirmation before finalizing the timetable
expectations.evidence: The response presents the timetable as final with rationale and a 'Tomorrow Preview' section, but never asks the user for confirmation, adjustments, or feedback before finalizing.

expectations.text: Response uses Chinese as primary language with English technical terms (Deep Work, Circuit Breaker, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Primary language is Chinese throughout (e.g., '综合判断', '觉醒补丁', '战术午休', '强制断电协议'). English retained for technical terms: Deep Work, Circuit Breaker, Team Meeting, Deload, Light Sleep, Deep Sleep, cutoff.
22:00 row explicitly marked as '强制断电协议' with bold formatting. Additional note: 'Light sleep 偏高 → 今晚严格执行，目标 22:15 入睡'.
